context: The response should exercise the `wiki-init` Context Specs skill using repo-specific harness behavior.

checklist.name: sets_standalone_wiki
checklist.description: Creates or describes a standalone wiki/vault rather than mixing it into code memory.

checklist.name: adds_conventions
checklist.description: Includes conventions and command docs for ingest, query, and lint workflows.

checklist.name: supports_human_understanding
checklist.description: Frames the wiki as supporting human understanding before intent.

checklist.name: separates_expert_memory
checklist.description: Keeps the human wiki distinct from the project Expert/learn memory used by agents.

checklist.name: uses_domain_discovery
checklist.description: Includes domain discovery or source ingestion steps grounded in provided material.
